## Self-audit checklist
- [ ] This PR has one clear architectural purpose.
- [ ] This PR preserves HC-TRUST-LAYER as the main technical brand.
- [ ] This PR uses HC:// as the protocol short name where appropriate.
- [ ] Humanity Chain is used only as historical/origin context.
- [ ] This PR avoids truth-guarantee language.
- [ ] This PR avoids AI-authority language.
- [ ] This PR preserves canonical record boundaries.
- [ ] Generated/index/export/cache artifacts are not treated as canonical records.
- [ ] Documentation does not claim implementation that does not exist.
- [ ] This PR does not create duplicate architecture.
- [ ] This PR does not expand roadmap hype.
- [ ] This PR keeps AI-assisted work under human review.
- [ ] Existing validation checks were run where possible.
- [ ] Terminology aligns with verification infrastructure, provenance, audit consistency, human-supervised validation, AI-assisted witness, public audit trail, and canonical record boundary.
